---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Problem / Use Case**
What are you trying to achieve? Why don't existing features cover it?

**Proposed Solution**
How you think it could work.

**Alternatives Considered**
Any workarounds you've tried or other approaches.

**Additional Context**
Screenshots, references, related issues.
